product_name: Magnesium Powder (multi-form with Taurine and Zinc)
corpus_notes: Highest complexity label in corpus. Multiple training values: (1) Powder format — serving size in grams/teaspoon rather than capsule. (2) Multiple magnesium forms contributing to elemental total — parser must sum correctly and not double-count. (3) Parenthetical providing elemental within compound (common AU format). (4) Total elemental highlighted separately. (5) Taurine — no NRV. (6) Zinc as amino acid chelate — form quality tier 1. Tests: compound_elemental_pattern, elemental_total_line, powder_serving_size.

expected_entries.name: Taurine
expected_entries.expected_report_behaviour: No RDI% — no established NRV for taurine

elemental_total_line.parser_behaviour: Recognised as total/summary line — do NOT create separate NutrientEntry. Use to validate sum of elemental values (350 + 13 + 12.2 + 24.8 = 400).

clinical_notes.ul_note: AU UL of 350mg applies to supplemental magnesium only. This product at 400mg elemental exceeds supplemental UL — flag in report.
clinical_notes.drug_interactions_flag: High dose magnesium may affect absorption of certain antibiotics (tetracyclines, quinolones) and bisphosphonates — take 2 hours apart.
